text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the exhibition race, we get to watch 
Tannhauser run. Afterward…

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I think that's basically how things went. 
That's why at this point…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Tannhauseeer!!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Kita, Sato! You came to watch me! 
Sorry, I really flubbed it big-time, huh?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: What are you talking about? Tannhauser, you were sooooo…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: So cool out there!!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh…?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
On the final stretch, when Rice was sprinting after 
the escaping Bourbon, you were hot on their heels 
and steadily closing the gap.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But it wasn't working! You couldn't quite reach them! 
With just 200 meters to the finish line, you could've changed 
strategies and protected your third place position.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But… you never gave up. Even though you knew you wouldn't 
catch them, you still gave everything you had until the very end.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but that's why I didn't notice the racer coming 
up from behind. And where'd it get me? Fourth place. 
Haha, I really don't have a good endgame.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Still, you had some sort of strategy, right? 
You tried to speed up despite knowing the risk.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Nah, that wasn't a strategy. 
I was just trying to win the race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that what all racers do? There's no point 
if we don't aim to win, is there?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I guess a loser like me shouldn't be handing 
out advice, huh? Haha… I knew just trying wouldn't 
be enough.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've got to keep pushing myself nonstop to get better, 
just like Teio and McQueen do.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh… Which means I gotta train more. Let's see, I guess starting from tomorrow…
(Rustle, rustle…)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whoa!? My notebook!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll grab it for you! …Oh, wow! The level of detail 
in these notes is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Ah… this is the book you carry everywhere…

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
"Special Pre-Race Training Routine", "Early Morning 
Running Checklist", "Ikuno's Recommended Gym 
Regimen by Muscle Group"…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, look at all the routines and schedules! 
And you've written "Gotta work hard!" so many times…

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Aah, don't read that! It's just a bunch 
of embarrassing scribbles… Urgh.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You haven't been doing all of these routines, have you? 
Every day? Even with all that community service?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Is that weird? I thought it was a pretty normal amount of work…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: This is a normal amount?! I'm no expert, but this feels like way too much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm pretty sure I need to increase my weight training. 
Hmm, I'll have to rearrange some things… My schedule's 
always so packed.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any secret weapons or special skills. If I want to win 
against those monster racers, there's only one option.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've just gotta work as hard as I can. Push myself more 
and more… so I can live up to the expectations of everyone 
supporting me.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Tannhauser was so amazing on the track, but she still 
doesn't consider herself special.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's what being at this school does to you. 
Tannhauser was definitely amazing, but there are 
even stronger racers…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, everyone here is on a whole other level. 
I knew that'd be the case, but still…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: …Okay, we're all here! Wanna get started?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh? Something's happening over there…

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, let's get this strategy sesh rolling! 
Us ex-convicts gotta make our grand comeback!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Woo, ex-comics! Wait, what's that?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'm just saying our community service is finally over, yeah? 
We seriously worked our butts off — headpats all around!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: We brought it on ourselves, you know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Now that we have more free time, it would be nice 
if we could work together to improve our skills.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I think we all know we're not exactly Tracen's best and brightest. 
But different perspectives might help us change that.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I agree. If you recall, I was trying to organize a joint training 
session in the first place. But somehow we got off track…

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Seriously, how did we get dragged into this? We always seem to draw the short straw when we're with you guys.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh?! You're not coming, Nature?! 
But I wanted to run with you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ngh… This was all your fault in the first place… …Also, I didn't say I wouldn't do it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hehe. All right then, let's kick off the meeting! For victory!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
They're so focused all of a sudden. 
I feel like I barely know them…

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
They're all serious about getting first place. 
I guess at Tracen, that's a normal thing, huh.
